__Hejun Chen__ 

hejun.chen@baruchmail.cuny.edu

__[My Linkedin Profile]__(https://www.linkedin.com/in/hejun-chen/)

I have a strong passion for Data Science.

__Education__

- Baruch College, City University of New York, 2024.

__R Projects__

- [Data Science NYC tlz zone analysis](tlc_zone.html)

- [Hotel Revenue Strategies](final.html)
